CreateExecutionV2.template.id: Unique template identifier generated by the server; required when updating a template; returned in detail and list queries
CreateExecutionV2.template.ref: Template ID to use when creating an execution
CreateExecutionV2.template.name: Template name, must be unique
CreateExecutionV2.template.type: Template type, options: INDIVIDUAL (personal template), GLOBAL (system template)
CreateExecutionV2.template.linear: Whether tasks are executed serially, default false
CreateExecutionV2.template.links: Describes the topology between operators; required when linear=false
CreateExecutionV2.template.updatedTime: Last update time, returned by detail and list APIs
CreateExecutionV2.template.supportedInstanceTypes: List of supported instance types, currently used for system templates only
CreateExecutionV2.tags: List of tags bound to the execution
